title: Songwriter Notebook progression feel
description: A chord-progression template: an ordered list of diatonic scale-degree indices applied to whatever key/mode the app is set to.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema (for editor validation), e.g. "./feel.schema.json".

id.description: Unique slug. Lowercase letters, digits and hyphens; this is also the deep-link value (?feel=<id>) and the file name feels/<id>.json.

name.description: Display name shown in the picker.

degrees.description: Diatonic scale-degree indices (0 = I, 1 = ii, ... 6 = vii). Repeats are allowed and significant.

description.description: Optional human note about the feel.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version this file targets. Currently 1.
